remaining_tasks.name: Build and test the modal component
Wire the modal into the sidebar launcher

decisions.decision: Build a GitHub repositories-style library selector modal rather than a collection selector
decisions.rationale: User clarified they meant library selection and selected the repository-list modal direction based on the GitHub repositories tab.

decisions.decision: Treat Last Updated on as latest library activity or item addition
decisions.rationale: User chose latest activity semantics over library-settings metadata.

decisions.decision: Use compact per-library sparklines and frontend summary computation for the first version
decisions.rationale: User chose compact sparkline; the approved spec avoids a backend summary endpoint unless frontend fetching proves too slow.

decisions.decision: Use UTC calendar semantics for library summary dates
decisions.rationale: Task 1 quality review found local timezone bucketing could shift API timestamps near midnight; fixed with regression coverage in commit a92feca.

next_action: Resume Task 2 from docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-08-library-selector-modal.md using superpowers:subagent-driven-development and superpowers:test-driven-development; dispatch a fresh implementer for LibrarySwitcherModal tests/component.
